items.q: Name the capital city of China.
items.explanation: The capital of China is Beijing.

items.q: Name the capital city of South Africa.
items.explanation: The capital of South Africa is Pretoria.

items.q: Name the capital city of Singapore.
items.explanation: The capital of Singapore is Singapore.

items.q: Name the capital city of Australia.
items.explanation: The capital of Australia is Canberra.

items.q: Name the capital city of Nigeria.
items.explanation: The capital of Nigeria is Abuja.

items.q: What is the capital of Finland?
items.explanation: Helsinki is the capital and most populous city in Finland. It is on the shore of the Gulf of Finland and is the seat of southern Finland's Uusimaa region.

items.q: Name the capital city of Netherlands.
items.explanation: The capital of Netherlands is Amsterdam.

items.q: Canberra is the capital of New Zealand.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: Name the capital city of Egypt.
items.explanation: The capital of Egypt is Cairo.

items.q: Warsaw is the capital of South Korea.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.
